---
title: &TITLE Ethan Shahan
last: Shahan
first: Ethan
people_group: alumni
education: B.S. | University of Rochester | 2025
#current_pos: Software Engineer | ByteDance
subtitle: Former B.S. Student
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/pubs/*.qmd"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  # links:
  #   - text: Website
  #     icon: house
  #     href: https://striest.github.io/
---

<hr>


:::{#about}



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<!-- ## Current Position
{{< meta current_pos >}} -->

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
